creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #9)
> Hmm. There was a much later fix (2024!) to the usage messages to
> track that change:

Yes - the default changed some time ago, but a fair bit of documentation and other content wasn't updated until much more recently.

bapt just merged my update to pkg-create.8 to clarify -f: https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/commit/fb47e7663ffbb4d5dd1c92f6ea9ad2f541450171

and a deprecation note for the handbook: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D48462
